candidate_summary: 4-component feedback attenuation: STFT/wavelet K-band gradient decomposition + per-band selective damping coefficient d_k + plate-thickness layer-wise gradient-norm budget beta_l + wood-seasoning warmup H_warm with high-freq annealing + mineral-salt pretraining data filter.
content_words: per-band selective damping coefficient strong-fundamental preserve weak attenuate
plate-thickness graduated layer-wise gradient-norm budget beta_l
wood-seasoning warmup phase gradual high-freq band attenuation
mineral-salt chemical pretraining data filter high-leverage contaminant remove
italian stradivarius violin Cremona wood plate
mineral salt borax zinc copper alum treatment
wood seasoning year micron plate thickness

results.name: WaveletGPT
results.rationale: Shares wavelet/STFT band-decomposition vocabulary; WaveletGPT uses wavelets for token representation, not per-band gradient damping; functional mismatch.

results.name: Wavelet Diffusion Posterior
results.rationale: Overlap limited to wavelet terminology; targets diffusion posterior sampling not LLM training stabilization.

results.name: Spike No More COLM 2025
results.rationale: Strong semantic alignment on loss-spike + layer-wise stabilization but uses embedding/init scaling not frequency-band damping.

results.name: AdaGC Adaptive Gradient Clipping
results.rationale: Adaptive per-parameter clipping closely parallels plate-thickness layer-wise budget; lacks frequency-band decomposition + warmup high-freq annealing.

results.name: MuonClip Optimizer
results.rationale: Optimizer-level clipping; no spectral/band damping + no layer-wise beta_l + no data filter.

results.name: Gradient Shaping Beyond Clipping
results.rationale: Generalized gradient shaping closest to selective damping d_k component-wise; covers feedback-attenuation + layer-wise treatment though not in explicit STFT/wavelet bands.

results.name: Hessian Layer-wise Clipping Gradient Annealing EMNLP 2025
results.rationale: Highest functional overlap: Hessian-informed layer-wise clipping matches plate-thickness beta_l calibration + explicit gradient annealing matches wood-seasoning warmup; missing STFT/wavelet band decomposition + data filter.

results.name: Stabilizing LLM Training SPAM Survey
results.rationale: Survey enumerates stabilization techniques + data-quality filtering; moderate breadth but no single mechanism matches band-selective damping.

decision_rationale: 2/8 prior-art hits (Gradient Shaping + Hessian Layer-wise Clip both at sem 0.70-0.75 and func 0.65-0.70); combined coverage on selective damping + layer-wise budget + gradient annealing crosses threshold. Total_hits >= 1 -> FAIL. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.80-0.90 / func 0.80-0.92 broader adjacency; verifier agrees on FAIL verdict but at lower hit count.
